abilities.name: 주눅
abilities.description: 주눅이 들어 스피드가 올라가는 타입이 있다.

flavorTexts.text: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.
A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.
